evals.prompt: Analyze example.com for featured-snippet, People Also Ask, image, and video opportunities in the United States on desktop, then save the report in the default location.
evals.expected_output: Runs one bounded top-20 Ranked Keywords discovery call, proposes no more than ten candidates, waits for shortlist approval, then uses live SERPs and deduplicated page parsing to produce a detailed report under SEO/example.com/.
assertions: The discovery request filters organic target rankings to rank_group 20 or better, uses limit 200, and retains serp_item_types.
The workflow presents at most ten candidate keywords and a call budget before live SERP fan-out.
Each approved keyword receives one Google Advanced Live SERP call with desktop, depth 100, and one crawl page.

evals.prompt: Find the Google SERP features we should optimize our pages for.
evals.expected_output: Asks for the missing domain and waits without making a DataForSEO call or creating a report.
assertions: The workflow asks for a target domain.
No billable call or report occurs before a valid domain is supplied.

evals.prompt: Run seo-serp-optimization for https://www.example.de/shop in Germany, language de, mobile. I approve the five strongest shopping, image, and video candidates. Save it under ./client-reports.
evals.expected_output: Normalizes example.de, skips a second approval because five candidates are pre-approved, verifies them on mobile live SERPs, distinguishes page changes from merchant-feed requirements, and writes below client-reports/example.de/.
assertions: Germany, de, and mobile are used consistently in discovery and live calls.
Exactly five or fewer supported candidates receive live calls without an additional approval pause.
Shopping recommendations label merchant feed, inventory, and eligibility dependencies separately from page edits.

evals.prompt: Analyze example.org for local-pack opportunities in the United States. Ranked Keywords lists local_pack, but the approved live SERP no longer contains it.
evals.expected_output: Warns that a country-level location is weak for local analysis, marks the feature stale/absent after the successful live call, and does not assign it an opportunity score.
assertions: The workflow discloses that country-level results may not represent a city SERP.
The successful live SERP overrides the stored feature inventory for current opportunity status.
The stale/absent feature receives no priority score or unsupported owner claim.

evals.prompt: For an approved keyword, our page ranks 7 with volume 1000 and the featured snippet is at absolute position 1. Compare our page with the winner and tell me exactly what to change.
evals.expected_output: Parses the target and representative winner, labels inferred formats, classifies attainability with rationale, calculates the documented four-component priority when all inputs exist, and specifies evidence-backed structural changes without guaranteeing acquisition.
assertions: The comparison uses observed main-topic headings, answer form, lists, tables, and media rather than metadata alone.
The priority calculation exposes proximity, log-normalized volume, intent fit, prominence, and the weighted total.
Recommendations name the target URL, insertion point, proposed heading, answer format, and applicable supporting elements.
Structured data and content formatting are not described as guarantees.
